creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
Comparing a recent installer for TrueOS Desktop with the most recent installer for FreeBSD-CURRENT, 

FreeBSD-12.0-CURRENT-amd64-20161021-r307747-memstick.img

a) installing to a USB flash drive; and then 

b) attempting to boot a MacBook Pro from that drive. 

I can not reproduce the problem with installations of FreeBSD. I performed two installations: 

* one GPT (UEFI)
* one GPT (BIOS + UEFI)
* both without forcing 4K.

I'll seek reopening of https://github.com/trueos/trueos-core/issues/15 and then we can probably close this issue in the FreeBSD area.
